title: AI Engineer
description:
Artificial Intelligence Engineer

Location: Singapore

Workplace type: Hybrid

Job Description:

We are seeking a highly skilled and innovative AI Engineer to join our team. 🌟 In this role, you will design, develop, and deploy AI models and systems that solve complex problems and enhance our product offerings. You will work closely with cross-functional teams to create intelligent solutions that drive efficiency and innovation. 🚀 The ideal candidate is passionate about artificial intelligence, thrives in a fast-paced environment, and is eager to make an impact. 💪

Job Responsibilities:

1) AI Model Development: 🧠

  • Design and implement machine learning and deep learning models tailored to business needs.
  • Optimize models for performance, scalability, and accuracy. 🎯

2) Data Processing and Analysis: 📊

  • Collect, clean, and preprocess data for AI applications.
  • Perform exploratory data analysis to identify patterns and insights. 🔎

3) Deployment and Maintenance: 🛠️

  • Deploy AI models to production environments using best practices.
  • Monitor, maintain, and update deployed models to ensure ongoing relevance and performance.

4) Collaboration and Problem Solving: 🤝

  • Collaborate with data scientists, software engineers, and product teams to integrate AI solutions.
  • Identify AI opportunities within existing workflows and propose innovative solutions. ✨

5) Research and Innovation: 💡

  • Stay updated with the latest advancements in AI technologies and methodologies.
  • Experiment with emerging tools and techniques to enhance AI capabilities.

6) Performance Monitoring: 📈

  • Develop tools and frameworks to monitor model behavior in real-time.
  • Troubleshoot issues and ensure model reliability under varying conditions.

7) Documentation and Reporting: ✍️

  • Document AI models, processes, and systems for internal use.
  • Create reports on AI performance metrics and insights for stakeholders.

Qualifications:

1) Education: 🎓

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, or a related field.

2) Experience:

  • 5+ years of experience in developing and deploying AI models.
  • Proven experience in working with large datasets and building AI/ML solutions.

3) Technical Skills: 💻

  • Proficiency in programming languages such as Python, R, or Java.
  • Experience with machine learning frameworks and libraries (TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn).
  • Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure) for AI deployment. ☁️
  • Strong knowledge of data preprocessing and feature engineering.
  • Expertise in neural networks, natural language processing (NLP), or computer vision is a plus.

4) Soft Skills:

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills. 🤔
  • Effective communication and collaboration abilities to work across teams.
  • A curious mindset and a drive to innovate and experiment. 🧐

5) Preferred:

  • Experience working in a startup environment is a plus. 🏢

postedCompany.description:
If you’re looking to join a talented team to solve the next generation of engineering, manufacturing and operational challenges for the 21st century, we’re eager to speak with you!


Groundup.Ai is the fastest growing deep-tech artificial intelligence (A.I.) company in the region. Headquartered in Singapore, but striving to be the number 1 in the world.


Culture at Groundup.Ai:

Regardless of your background, education, or industry experience — if you’ve done exceptional work before, join us to rethink the future of engineering, manufacturing, and safety.


We believe in moving quickly and breaking out of the box. This means we say no to old-fashioned, bureaucratic ways of working. Instead, we promote open communication and an inclusive and collaborative working environment. Anyone with the persistence, hunger, and focus to solve challenging problems will have a place at our table.


What we do:

Groundup.ai is the go-to partner for Industrial AI solutions for machine maintenance and workplace safety. Our core solutions lie in Predictive Maintenance, Computer Vision, and Forklift Safety Monitoring for a wide range of industries including Manufacturing, Logistics, and Oil & Gas.


We support industrial companies in reducing workplace injuries and deaths by improving workplace safety standards through our Computer Vision is driven safety monitoring solution.


We use a unique acoustic-first AI IoT approach to solving unplanned downtime for industrial companies. Our Predictive Maintenance solution is driven by our ‘proprietary IoT sound sensors and AI platform’.


We then leverage our unique 3-dimensional approach to analyze the sound data collected to pick out sound anomalies and accurately identify potential machine failures and downtime. This helps clients to save substantial maintenance expenses without the need for a huge learning curve or high-risk deployments on the ground.


With a highly accurate system in place to identify and alert workers and managers of safety breaches, allows appropriate actions to be taken before any catastrophes happen. Our heavy machinery safety monitoring solution further leverages our unparalleled spatial measurement algorithm to detect nearby humans and objects to prevent unwanted collisions and accidents, thereby tackling one of the most common causes of workplace fatalities.


At heart, we see ourselves as a catalyst to help industrial companies transform into ‘Industry 4.0’ and beyond.


What we have accomplished:

Our amazing team has achieved market leadership positions in industries we are involved in and we are able to prove our concepts rapidly. We have gone on to win multiple prestigious awards and recognitions from government bodies and esteemed organizations including:

  • Being the first-ever 3-time consecutive finalists of the prestigious Open Innovation Platform (OIP) challenge organized by the Infocomm Media Development Authority (IMDA)
  • Finalists of the Maritime Port Authority (MPA) Pier71 Smart Port Challenge in 2020.
  • Finalists of the Singapore Mobility Challenge 2020 by the Land Transport Authority (LTA)
  • 4-time Finalists of the Trade and Connectivity Challenge 2020 organized by Enterprise Singapore.

    Check out here for more information (https://groundup.ai/company/awards-and-achievements/)
postedCompany.name: GROUNDUP.AI PTE. LTD.
